reviews.review_title: I couldn't get it to setup right.
reviews.review_description: Looks interesting enough!  It might be fun, but it wouldn't set up right. The workstation and the collector will only go way up in the ceiling or as low as my knees.   Other things scattered about seem okay.  A few things are below my floor. I'll set the workstation and collector as low as it will go, my knee hight.  Then the game starts with the VR floor at my knees. Then I mine a wall but the loot is now below the floor and can't be shoveled up.  I was using a quest 3.  I tried different boundaries settings even turned the boundaries off. It's always the same.  Hmmm?
This game is great fun to play and free. Obviously it still needs a little work but there is no reason not to try it.
